evidence: Phase 4 (FGAP-026 closure phase 4: Workflow-execute + dispatch tools) complete at HEAD 569eec4 via single atomic sub-phase 4.1 (TASK-041 / VER-014). Original 4-sub-phase canonical scope reduced after Explore at compiled-contexts/explore-phase4-workflow-surface.md surfaced existing surface: 4.2 workflow-list + 4.3 workflow-status already shipped pre-Phase-4; `workflow` tool wraps executeWorkflow with auto-resume detection (semantic match for canonical workflow-execute under non-canonical name). Phase 4 reduced to: rename `workflow` → `workflow-execute` (canonical verb-noun alignment) + add workflow-resume (explicit-resume-by-runId complement). Out of scope: workflow-help (→ FGAP-044 tool-discovery), workflow-list-interactive UI (substantively-justified subcommand-only). Test counts: pi-workflows 824 → 829 (+5).
